info.name: Oracle Weblogic Server - Remote Command Execution
author: dwisiswant0
info.description: Oracle WebLogic Server contains an easily exploitable remote command execution vulnerability which allows unauthenticated attackers with network access via HTTP to compromise the server.
info.remediation: Apply the latest security patches provided by Oracle to fix the vulnerability.
